domain: agriculture, garden equipment, irrigation fittings, pruning tools, and small farm hardware

ideas.product_context: Field irrigation systems that use flexible polyethylene drip tubing in vegetable beds or orchards.
ideas.core_function: Pinches and locks the open end of a drip line so the tube can be flushed, resealed, or reopened without cutting.
ideas.likely_main_part: Cam-lock clamp body with a curved tube channel, hinge boss, latch hook, and thumb cam surface.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires blended cylindrical tube seating, asymmetric hinge geometry, latch clearances, cam contact surfaces, and realistic wall thickness transitions.

ideas.product_context: Bypass pruning shears used for cutting stems, vines, and small branches.
ideas.core_function: Holds the pivot screw, supports the moving blade, and maintains blade alignment under cutting load.
ideas.likely_main_part: Forged or machined pivot carrier half with blade pocket, pivot boss, spring seat, and handle transition.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines organic ergonomic contours with precise coaxial pivot features, recessed pockets, tapered ribs, and high-load filleted transitions.

ideas.product_context: Low-pressure garden and greenhouse irrigation using small sprinkler heads mounted on stakes.
ideas.core_function: Connects a vertical support stake, feed tube, and threaded sprinkler nozzle into one adjustable junction.
ideas.likely_main_part: Compact adapter body with barb inlet, stake socket, nozzle thread, and angled flow passage.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests intersecting internal passages, hose barb profiles, molded-looking external ribs, threaded cylindrical features, and angled connector geometry.

ideas.product_context: Small manual or walk-behind seed drills for sowing vegetable seeds in rows.
ideas.core_function: Meters seeds by carrying them in repeated pockets from a hopper into the drop chute.
ideas.likely_main_part: Cylindrical metering roller with radial seed cells, shaft bore, indexing groove, and end retention shoulder.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Needs repeated patterned cavities on a curved surface, precise angular spacing, pocket edge radii, shaft alignment, and manufacturable undercut-aware details.

ideas.product_context: Reusable hose fittings for garden irrigation, washdown stations, and small farm water lines.
ideas.core_function: Slides over a coupler body to retain locking balls or latch tabs around a mating plug.
ideas.likely_main_part: Cylindrical sliding sleeve with grip knurling, internal retention groove, chamfered lead-in, and stop shoulder.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests concentric internal and external features, fine grip texture, hidden groove representation, chamfer consistency, and functional sliding clearances.

ideas.product_context: Vineyard, orchard, and garden trellis systems where support wires need periodic tensioning.
ideas.core_function: Winds trellis wire and locks against reverse rotation using a pawl.
ideas.likely_main_part: Ratchet spool wheel with wire slot, central square drive, toothed perimeter, and side flanges.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires accurately repeated ratchet teeth, spool-like geometry, drive socket detail, wire capture slots, and robust flange-to-hub transitions.

ideas.product_context: Inline mesh filters used before drip irrigation zones to protect emitters from sediment.
ideas.core_function: Compresses and secures a removable filter bowl against the filter head seal.
ideas.likely_main_part: Split clamp ring with hinge lug, over-center latch lug, seal compression face, and ribbed outer grip.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests split circular forms, hinge and latch alignment, gasket compression surfaces, ribbed grip details, and nontrivial assembly clearance.

ideas.product_context: Small walk-behind cultivators or hand-pushed weeders with replaceable spring tines.
ideas.core_function: Receives and locks a curved tine while transferring soil resistance loads into the frame.
ideas.likely_main_part: Angled socket block with tapered tine bore, cross-pin hole, frame mounting bosses, and reinforcing web.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines angled bores, load-bearing gussets, intersecting fastener holes, tapered retention geometry, and heavy fillets around stress paths.

ideas.product_context: Folding grafting knives used by nursery workers and orchard growers.
ideas.core_function: Locks the blade open while allowing controlled release for folding.
ideas.likely_main_part: Thin spring lock bar with pivot hole, blade tang contact face, thumb relief, and formed spring profile.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Challenges CAD representation with thin spring geometry, precise contact faces, small relief cutouts, bend-like profiles, and tolerance-sensitive pivot spacing.

ideas.product_context: Garden rainwater harvesting barrels fitted with low-pressure spigots and hose outlets.
ideas.core_function: Clamps a spigot fitting through a curved plastic barrel wall while compressing a gasket.
ideas.likely_main_part: Large internally threaded bulkhead nut with scalloped grip perimeter, gasket seat, barrel-wall relief face, and lead-in chamfer.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests large thread-like cylindrical detail, ergonomic scalloped edges, sealing faces, curvature-aware mounting context, and realistic compression hardware geometry.
